     "installed": {
       "client_id": "215390634092-bikga9s6g7vime6v6ae9sjv80j88m6hu.apps.googleusercontent.com",
       "project_id": "acquired-jet-478701-b3",
       "client_secret": "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",
       "auth_uri": "https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/auth",
       "token_uri": "https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token",
       "redirect_uris": ["http://localhost"]
     }
   }
   ```

2. **`scripts/token.json`** - OAuth 2.0 Access Token (Generated after first run)
   - Contains: Access token, refresh token, expiry, scopes
   - Structure:
   ```json
   {
     "token": "ya29.a0ATi6K2tCh55sr6H...",
     "refresh_token": "1//012TrP4SQDqCSCgYI...",
     "token_uri": "https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token",
     "client_id": "215390634092-...",
     "client_secret": "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",
     "scopes": ["https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly"],
     "expiry": "2025-11-24T22:33:39Z"
   }
   ```

**OAuth Flow**:
1. Script checks for existing `token.json`
2. If token exists and valid, uses it
3. If token expired but has refresh_token, calls `refresh(Request())`
4. If no valid token, loads `credentials.json` and initiates `InstalledAppFlow`
5. Browser opens for user authentication (localhost:0)
6. After auth, new token saved to `token.json` for future use
7. Scope required: `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly` (read-only access)

**Setup Requirements**:
- Enable Google Drive API at: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/drive.googleapis.com
- Create OAuth 2.0 credentials at: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials
- Application type must be "Desktop app"
- Download credentials.json and place in scripts/ directory

---

## 3. SCRIPT OUTPUT & DATA FLOW

**Output Directory**: `drive_knowledge/` (sibling to scripts directory)

**Directory Structure**:
```
drive_knowledge/
├── documents/           # Extracted text files
│   ├── a1b2c3d4e5f6.txt
│   ├── f6e5d4c3b2a1.txt
│   └── ... (214 documents currently)
├── metadata/            # File metadata JSON
│   ├── a1b2c3d4e5f6.json
│   ├── f6e5d4c3b2a1.json
│   └── ... (example below)
├── embeddings/          # Gemini embeddings (768-dim vectors)
│   └── ... (sparse - only if GOOGLE_API_KEY set)
└── index.json           # Master index
```

**Example Metadata File** (`db11b99e62dae2517e9acfd31d8a1863.json`):
```json
{
  "id": "1uK9PWQIkHPLCGIiKbALmaWeMr_rR-FY6",
  "name": "shadowtagai_vertex_rollup.txt",
  "mime_type": "text/plain",
  "file_type": "txt",
  "size": "7581",
  "created": "2025-11-17T22:33:45.614Z",
  "modified": "2025-11-17T22:33:44.476Z",
  "owners": [{"displayName": "Erik", "emailAddress": "user@example.com", ...}],
  "web_link": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1uK9PWQIkHPLCGIiKbALmaWeMr_rR-FY6/view",
  "hash": "db11b99e62dae2517e9acfd31d8a1863",
  "text_length": 7579,
  "word_count": 457
}
```

**Index File** (`index.json`):
```json
{
  "extracted_at": "2025-11-24T13:40:01.687685",
  "total_files": 0,
  "processed": 0,
  "skipped": 0,
  "files": [
    {
      "hash": "a1b2c3d4e5f6",
      "name": "My Book.pdf",
      "type": "pdf",
      "size": 1024000,
      "word_count": 8500,
      "has_embedding": true
    }
  ]
}
```

**Current Extraction Status**:
- Index shows 0 processed files (extraction hasn't been run recently)
- Documents directory has 214 extracted files (from previous runs)
- Sample files: PDFs, DOCX files, text files, TypeScript recipes, business advice docs, technical papers
- File naming: Uses MD5 hash of content (e.g., `Предиктивное_моделирование_на_практике__16_____Мак.txt`)

---

## 4. CONFIGURATION & RELATED FILES

**Requirements File** (`requirements-drive.txt`):
```
google-api-python-client==2.108.0
google-auth-httplib2==0.2.0
google-auth-oauthlib==1.2.0
google-generativeai==0.3.2
PyPDF2==3.0.1
python-docx==1.1.0
ebooklib==0.18
beautifulsoup4==4.12.2
markdown==3.5.1
lxml==4.9.3
html5lib==1.1
```

**Memory Schema** (`memory/schema.json`):
Defines the structure for merged knowledge entries with:
- Architecture specs (Judge #6, ShadowTag 2.0, Cor/NS)
- LLM allocation strategy
- Bootstrap gates and cost economics

**Key Related Scripts**:

1. **`merge_drive_knowledge.py`** - Integrates extracted Drive content into memory system
   - Loads `drive_knowledge/index.json`
   - Converts Drive documents to knowledge entry format
   - Merges with existing `memory/current.json`
   - Creates timestamped snapshots
   - Generates statistics

2. **`claude_code_memory_local.py`** - Deploys memory to Claude Code
   - Installs memory file to `~/.claude-code/memory.md`
   - Creates config at `~/.claude-code/config.json`

3. **`extract_and_commit.py`** - Extracts conversations and commits to Git

4. **`llm_blender_rotation.py`** - 4-LLM orchestration with memory context

---

## 5. MEMORY SYSTEM INTEGRATION

**Knowledge Entry Format** (after merge):
```json
{
  "id": "drive_db11b99e62dae2517e9acfd31d8a1863",
  "source": "google-drive",
  "type": "txt",
  "title": "shadowtagai_vertex_rollup.txt",
  "content": "Full extracted text...",
  "created_at": "2025-11-17T22:33:45.614Z",
  "modified_at": "2025-11-17T22:33:44.476Z",
  "metadata": {
    "drive_id": "1uK9PWQIkHPLCGIiKbALmaWeMr_rR-FY6",
    "mime_type": "text/plain",
    "size": "7581",
    "owners": [...],
    "web_link": "https://drive.google.com/...",
    "word_count": 457,
    "text_length": 7579
  },
  "embedding": [0.123, -0.456, ...],
  "tags": ["txt", "shadowtagai", "documentation"],
  "indexed_at": "2025-11-24T13:40:01.687685"
}
```

**Current Memory State** (`memory/current.json`):
- Version: 1.0.0
- 2 conversations loaded (manual imports)
- Architecture definitions: Judge #6, ShadowTag 2.0, Cor/NS
- No Google Drive knowledge entries yet (last extraction empty)

---

## 6. GOOGLE DRIVE API DETAILS

**Supported MIME Types**:
- Documents: `application/pdf`, `application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document`, `text/plain`, `text/markdown`
- Ebooks: `application/epub+zip`, `application/x-mobipocket-ebook`
- Archives: `application/zip`, `application/gzip`, `application/x-tar`
- Google Workspace: `application/vnd.google-apps.document`, `.spreadsheet`, `.presentation`
- Code: `text/x-python`, `application/javascript`, `application/typescript`

**Embedding Generation** (Optional):
- Uses Google Generative AI (Gemini embedding-001)
- Generates 768-dimensional vectors
- Limited to first 20,000 characters of text
- Cost: ~$0.00015 per document (~$0.0001 per 10k chars)
- Enables semantic search and similarity clustering

**API Quotas**:
- Google Drive API: 10,000 requests per 100 seconds
- Script includes rate limiting for large extractions

---

## Key Files Summary

| File | Purpose | Location |
|------|---------|----------|
| `extract_google_drive.py` | Main extraction script | scripts/ |
| `credentials.json` | OAuth 2.0 client config | scripts/ |
| `token.json` | OAuth 2.0 access token | scripts/ |
| `requirements-drive.txt` | Python dependencies | root |
| `merge_drive_knowledge.py` | Integrate with memory system | scripts/ |
| `drive_knowledge/` | Extracted content storage | root |
| `memory/current.json` | Unified knowledge base | memory/ |
| `DRIVE_EXTRACTION_GUIDE.md` | Complete documentation | root |

---

This system provides a complete pipeline for extracting personal knowledge from Google Drive, processing it with AI embeddings, and integrating it into a persistent memory system available to Claude Code and other LLM interfaces.

# Plan: Fix ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty Solidity Contract

## Issues Identified

### 1. Compiler Warnings
```
Warning: Unused function parameter → contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol:139
         bytes calldata validationProof

Warning: Unused local variable → contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol:154
         uint256 totalPaid
```

### 2. Test Failure (Root Cause)
```
AssertionError: expected '0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6F4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266' (overlord)
                to equal '0x3d7d0aa0DF762a686E491F2b863E1Aa5F4fE0e1D' (childTBA)
```

**Root Cause**: `RoyaltyMath.distributeRecursive()` breaks the loop BEFORE distributing royalties when parent == overlord. Also, `RoyaltyPaid` event is never emitted in `distributeViaUserOp`.

## Fixes

### Fix 1: `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` line 137-139
Prefix unused parameter with underscore:
```solidity
function distributeViaUserOp(
    UserOperation calldata userOp,
    uint256 usdCents,
    bytes calldata /* validationProof */  // Or _validationProof
) external whenNotPaused {
```

### Fix 2: `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` line 152-159
Remove unused variable assignment and add RoyaltyPaid events:
```solidity
// 3. Multi-level royalty logic using Library
(uint256 totalPaid, address[] memory recipients, uint256[] memory amounts, uint8[] memory generations) =
    RoyaltyMath.distributeRecursive(
        fromTBA,
        usdCents,
        parentOf,
        baseRoyaltyBps,
        claimedCents,
        OVERLORD
    );

// Emit events for each payout
for (uint256 i = 0; i < recipients.length; i++) {
    emit RoyaltyPaid(recipients[i], amounts[i], generations[i]);
}
```

### Fix 3: `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` - Restructure logic
The loop breaks BEFORE distributing when parent == overlord. Fix:
```solidity
function distributeRecursive(...) internal returns (
    uint256 totalPaid,
    address[] memory recipients,
    uint256[] memory amounts,
    uint8[] memory generations
) {
    address current = from;
    uint256 remaining = usdCents;
    totalPaid = 0;

    // Pre-allocate arrays (max 10 levels)
    recipients = new address[](10);
    amounts = new uint256[](10);
    generations = new uint8[](10);
    uint256 count = 0;

    for (uint256 i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        address parent = parentOf[current];
        if (parent == address(0)) break;

        uint16 bps = baseRoyaltyBps[current];
        if (bps > 0) {
            uint256 cut = (remaining * bps) / 10000;
            claimedCents[parent] += cut;
            recipients[count] = parent;
            amounts[count] = cut;
            generations[count] = uint8(i);
            count++;
            totalPaid += cut;
            remaining -= cut;
        }

        if (parent == overlord) break; // Check AFTER distributing
        current = parent;
    }

    // Resize arrays to actual count
    assembly {
        mstore(recipients, count)
        mstore(amounts, count)
        mstore(generations, count)
    }
}
```

### Fix 4: Test expectation alignment
The test expects childTBA to "retain" 18%, but the library credits PARENT. Either:
- **Option A**: Change library so child retains bps% and parent gets (100-bps)%
- **Option B**: Update test to match current library behavior (parent gets bps%)

## Files to Modify
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` | Fix unused param, add event emissions |
| `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` | Fix break order, return event data |
| `test/FullIntegration.test.js` | Verify expectations match implementation |

## 1. Primary Request and Intent

The user requested parallel execution of two tasks:
1. **Fix GKE Deployment Quota Issue**: Terraform deployment failed due to exhausted CPU and SSD quotas. User wanted to delete unused resources to free quota for `shadowtagai-production` cluster.
2. **Run Google Drive Migration**: Extract personal Drive contents to corporate memory bank while GKE infrastructure deploys.

Additionally, user wanted to:
- Push all PRs and merge all changes
- Save context to memory for reopening in new thread

## 2. Key Technical Concepts

- **GCloud ADC (Application Default Credentials)**: OAuth-based authentication for Terraform
- **Terraform GCS Backend**: Remote state storage in `acquired-jet-478701-b3-terraform-state`
- **GKE Autopilot vs Standard Clusters**: Quota consumption differences
- **Google Drive API OAuth Flow**: `credentials.json` → browser auth → `token.json`
- **UUPS Upgradeable Proxy Pattern**: ShadowTag contracts use OpenZeppelin upgrades
- **n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss Squadron**: 650-agent AI swarm on port 8600
- **Ultrathink Prompt Architecture**: ID/EGO/SUPEREGO decision framework

**Purpose**: Deployment automation script - Anthropic Vertex references removed

export PROJECT_ID

```

```bash

environment = "production"
EOF

fi

### `/Users/pikeymickey/Documents/Claude Code/Code/Claude Demo/aiyou-fastapi-services/terraform/secrets.tf`
**Purpose**: Replaced Anthropic secrets with Gemini

```hcl
# Secret Manager configuration
# Anthropic Vertex removed - using Gemini API

resource "google_secret_manager_secret" "gemini_api_key" {
  secret_id = "gemini-api-key"
  project   = var.project_id

  replication {
    auto {}
  }

  labels = {
    app       = "shadowtagai"
    component = "orchestrator"
  }

  depends_on = [google_project_service.required_apis]
}

resource "google_secret_manager_secret_iam_member" "gemini_api_key_accessor" {
  secret_id = google_secret_manager_secret.gemini_api_key.id
  role      = "roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor"
  member    = "serviceAccount:${google_service_account.shadowtagai_orchestrator.email}"
}

output "gemini_secret_name" {
  value       = google_secret_manager_secret.gemini_api_key.name
  description = "Secret Manager secret name for Gemini API key"
}
```

# Plan: Fix ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty Solidity Contract

## Issues Identified

### 1. Compiler Warnings
```
Warning: Unused function parameter → contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol:139
         bytes calldata validationProof

Warning: Unused local variable → contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol:154
         uint256 totalPaid
```

### 2. Test Failure (Root Cause)
```
AssertionError: expected '0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6F4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266' (overlord)
                to equal '0x3d7d0aa0DF762a686E491F2b863E1Aa5F4fE0e1D' (childTBA)
```

**Root Cause**: `RoyaltyMath.distributeRecursive()` breaks the loop BEFORE distributing royalties when parent == overlord. Also, `RoyaltyPaid` event is never emitted in `distributeViaUserOp`.

## Fixes

### Fix 1: `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` line 137-139
Prefix unused parameter with underscore:
```solidity
function distributeViaUserOp(
    UserOperation calldata userOp,
    uint256 usdCents,
    bytes calldata /* validationProof */  // Or _validationProof
) external whenNotPaused {
```

### Fix 2: `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` line 152-159
Remove unused variable assignment and add RoyaltyPaid events:
```solidity
// 3. Multi-level royalty logic using Library
(uint256 totalPaid, address[] memory recipients, uint256[] memory amounts, uint8[] memory generations) =
    RoyaltyMath.distributeRecursive(
        fromTBA,
        usdCents,
        parentOf,
        baseRoyaltyBps,
        claimedCents,
        OVERLORD
    );

// Emit events for each payout
for (uint256 i = 0; i < recipients.length; i++) {
    emit RoyaltyPaid(recipients[i], amounts[i], generations[i]);
}
```

### Fix 3: `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` - Restructure logic
The loop breaks BEFORE distributing when parent == overlord. Fix:
```solidity
function distributeRecursive(...) internal returns (
    uint256 totalPaid,
    address[] memory recipients,
    uint256[] memory amounts,
    uint8[] memory generations
) {
    address current = from;
    uint256 remaining = usdCents;
    totalPaid = 0;

    // Pre-allocate arrays (max 10 levels)
    recipients = new address[](10);
    amounts = new uint256[](10);
    generations = new uint8[](10);
    uint256 count = 0;

    for (uint256 i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        address parent = parentOf[current];
        if (parent == address(0)) break;

        uint16 bps = baseRoyaltyBps[current];
        if (bps > 0) {
            uint256 cut = (remaining * bps) / 10000;
            claimedCents[parent] += cut;
            recipients[count] = parent;
            amounts[count] = cut;
            generations[count] = uint8(i);
            count++;
            totalPaid += cut;
            remaining -= cut;
        }

        if (parent == overlord) break; // Check AFTER distributing
        current = parent;
    }

    // Resize arrays to actual count
    assembly {
        mstore(recipients, count)
        mstore(amounts, count)
        mstore(generations, count)
    }
}
```

### Fix 4: Test expectation alignment
The test expects childTBA to "retain" 18%, but the library credits PARENT. Either:
- **Option A**: Change library so child retains bps% and parent gets (100-bps)%
- **Option B**: Update test to match current library behavior (parent gets bps%)

## Files to Modify
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` | Fix unused param, add event emissions |
| `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` | Fix break order, return event data |
| `test/FullIntegration.test.js` | Verify expectations match implementation |

content.text:
Good question. Here are the best options for your setup:

### Option 1: GCS Bucket (Recommended for GKE)
```bash
# Export session context to JSON
cat > /tmp/claude_memory.json << 'EOF'
{
  "session_id": "serialized-forging-robin",
  "timestamp": "2025-11-28T19:15:00Z",
  "plan_file": "~/.claude/plans/serialized-forging-robin.md",
  "context": { ... }
}
EOF

# Upload to GCS (accessible by GKE pods)
gsutil cp /tmp/claude_memory.json gs://acquired-jet-478701-b3-terraform-state/memory/
```

### Option 2: CLAUDE.md in Repo (Standard)
```bash
# Already exists - antigrav reads on startup
cat aiyou-fastapi-services/CLAUDE.md
```

### Option 3: Firestore (Real-time sync)
```python
# Your pods already have access
from google.cloud import firestore
db = firestore.Client()
db.collection('claude_memory').document('current').set(memory_dict)
```

### Option 4: MCP Memory Server
```bash
# Add to ~/.claude.json
claude mcp add memory -- npx -y @anthropic/mcp-memory
```

### My Recommendation
For antigrav specifically:
1. **Merge context into `erik-hancock-llm-memory/`** - your existing memory bank
2. **Export plan file to GCS** - GKE pods can fetch on startup
3. **Add to Ultrathink prompt** - bake key context into the system prompt

Want me to set up one of these before exit?

## Recent Commits
- `3ffd692d` fix: ShadowTag DNA Royalty contracts + tests passing
- `a96d50d5` feat: Unify squadron to 650 agents + add Ultrathink prompt
- `3ee2e0e0` feat: Add CodePMCS - AI-Powered Code Quality Platform (#295)

---

# Plan: Fix ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty Solidity Contract

## Issues Identified

### 1. Compiler Warnings
```
Warning: Unused function parameter → contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol:139
         bytes calldata validationProof

Warning: Unused local variable → contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol:154
         uint256 totalPaid
```

### 2. Test Failure (Root Cause)
```
AssertionError: expected '0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6F4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266' (overlord)
                to equal '0x3d7d0aa0DF762a686E491F2b863E1Aa5F4fE0e1D' (childTBA)
```

**Root Cause**: `RoyaltyMath.distributeRecursive()` breaks the loop BEFORE distributing royalties when parent == overlord. Also, `RoyaltyPaid` event is never emitted in `distributeViaUserOp`.

## Fixes

### Fix 1: `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` line 137-139
Prefix unused parameter with underscore:
```solidity
function distributeViaUserOp(
    UserOperation calldata userOp,
    uint256 usdCents,
    bytes calldata /* validationProof */  // Or _validationProof
) external whenNotPaused {
```

### Fix 2: `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` line 152-159
Remove unused variable assignment and add RoyaltyPaid events:
```solidity
// 3. Multi-level royalty logic using Library
(uint256 totalPaid, address[] memory recipients, uint256[] memory amounts, uint8[] memory generations) =
    RoyaltyMath.distributeRecursive(
        fromTBA,
        usdCents,
        parentOf,
        baseRoyaltyBps,
        claimedCents,
        OVERLORD
    );

// Emit events for each payout
for (uint256 i = 0; i < recipients.length; i++) {
    emit RoyaltyPaid(recipients[i], amounts[i], generations[i]);
}
```

### Fix 3: `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` - Restructure logic
The loop breaks BEFORE distributing when parent == overlord. Fix:
```solidity
function distributeRecursive(...) internal returns (
    uint256 totalPaid,
    address[] memory recipients,
    uint256[] memory amounts,
    uint8[] memory generations
) {
    address current = from;
    uint256 remaining = usdCents;
    totalPaid = 0;

    // Pre-allocate arrays (max 10 levels)
    recipients = new address[](10);
    amounts = new uint256[](10);
    generations = new uint8[](10);
    uint256 count = 0;

    for (uint256 i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        address parent = parentOf[current];
        if (parent == address(0)) break;

        uint16 bps = baseRoyaltyBps[current];
        if (bps > 0) {
            uint256 cut = (remaining * bps) / 10000;
            claimedCents[parent] += cut;
            recipients[count] = parent;
            amounts[count] = cut;
            generations[count] = uint8(i);
            count++;
            totalPaid += cut;
            remaining -= cut;
        }

        if (parent == overlord) break; // Check AFTER distributing
        current = parent;
    }

    // Resize arrays to actual count
    assembly {
        mstore(recipients, count)
        mstore(amounts, count)
        mstore(generations, count)
    }
}
```

### Fix 4: Test expectation alignment
The test expects childTBA to "retain" 18%, but the library credits PARENT. Either:
- **Option A**: Change library so child retains bps% and parent gets (100-bps)%
- **Option B**: Update test to match current library behavior (parent gets bps%)

## Files to Modify
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` | Fix unused param, add event emissions |
| `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` | Fix break order, return event data |
| `test/FullIntegration.test.js` | Verify expectations match implementation |

# Plan: Share Claude Memory with Antigravity (3 Methods)

## Task
Export current Claude Code session memory to Antigravity/Ultrathink via:
1. GCS Bucket (for GKE pods)
2. CLAUDE.md (for new sessions)
3. Firestore (real-time sync)

---

## Existing Infrastructure (Already Built)

| Component | Location | Status |
|-----------|----------|--------|
| Memory Schema | `erik-hancock-llm-memory/memory/current.json` | ✅ 214 docs |
| Firestore Backend | `kosmos/persistence/firestore_backend.py` | ✅ Ready |
| GCS Pattern | `{project}-workbench-memory/memory/` | ✅ Bucket exists |
| CLAUDE.md | Root `/CLAUDE.md` | ✅ Exists |
| Ultrathink Prompt | `prompts/antigravity_ultrathink.py` | ✅ 650 agents |

---

## Implementation Plan

### 1. GCS Bucket Export
**File**: `scripts/sync_claude_memory_gcs.py`

```python
# Export session context to GCS
from google.cloud import storage

def sync_to_gcs(memory_dict: dict):
    client = storage.Client(project="acquired-jet-478701-b3")
    bucket = client.bucket("acquired-jet-478701-b3-workbench-memory")
    blob = bucket.blob("memory/claude_session.json")
    blob.upload_from_string(json.dumps(memory_dict, indent=2))
```

**Data to export**:
- Current session plan (`~/.claude/plans/*.md`)
- Todo list state
- Background process IDs
- Last 10 tool calls summary

### 2. CLAUDE.md Update
**File**: Root `/CLAUDE.md`

Append section:
```markdown
## Current Session Context
- Plan: ~/.claude/plans/serialized-forging-robin.md
- Terraform: shadowtagai-production deploying
- Squadron: 650 agents operational on :8600
- Last sync: {timestamp}
```

### 3. Firestore Real-time Sync
**File**: `scripts/sync_claude_memory_firestore.py`

```python
# Real-time memory sync to Firestore
from google.cloud import firestore

def sync_to_firestore(memory_dict: dict):
    db = firestore.Client(project="acquired-jet-478701-b3")
    doc_ref = db.collection("claude_memory").document("current")
    doc_ref.set({
        "session_id": "serialized-forging-robin",
        "timestamp": firestore.SERVER_TIMESTAMP,
        "plan_file": memory_dict.get("plan"),
        "todos": memory_dict.get("todos"),
        "background_processes": memory_dict.get("bg_procs"),
        "context": memory_dict.get("context")
    })
```

---

## Files to Create/Modify

| File | Action | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `scripts/sync_claude_memory.py` | CREATE | Unified sync script (all 3 methods) |
| `/CLAUDE.md` | MODIFY | Append session context section |
| `erik-hancock-llm-memory/memory/current.json` | MODIFY | Merge session data |

---

## Execution Order
1. Create unified `sync_claude_memory.py` script
2. Export current session to `memory/current.json`
3. Upload to GCS bucket
4. Write to Firestore
5. Update root CLAUDE.md

---

# Plan: Fix ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty Solidity Contract

## Issues Identified

### 1. Compiler Warnings
```
Warning: Unused function parameter → contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol:139
         bytes calldata validationProof

Warning: Unused local variable → contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol:154
         uint256 totalPaid
```

### 2. Test Failure (Root Cause)
```
AssertionError: expected '0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6F4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266' (overlord)
                to equal '0x3d7d0aa0DF762a686E491F2b863E1Aa5F4fE0e1D' (childTBA)
```

**Root Cause**: `RoyaltyMath.distributeRecursive()` breaks the loop BEFORE distributing royalties when parent == overlord. Also, `RoyaltyPaid` event is never emitted in `distributeViaUserOp`.

## Fixes

### Fix 1: `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` line 137-139
Prefix unused parameter with underscore:
```solidity
function distributeViaUserOp(
    UserOperation calldata userOp,
    uint256 usdCents,
    bytes calldata /* validationProof */  // Or _validationProof
) external whenNotPaused {
```

### Fix 2: `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` line 152-159
Remove unused variable assignment and add RoyaltyPaid events:
```solidity
// 3. Multi-level royalty logic using Library
(uint256 totalPaid, address[] memory recipients, uint256[] memory amounts, uint8[] memory generations) =
    RoyaltyMath.distributeRecursive(
        fromTBA,
        usdCents,
        parentOf,
        baseRoyaltyBps,
        claimedCents,
        OVERLORD
    );

// Emit events for each payout
for (uint256 i = 0; i < recipients.length; i++) {
    emit RoyaltyPaid(recipients[i], amounts[i], generations[i]);
}
```

### Fix 3: `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` - Restructure logic
The loop breaks BEFORE distributing when parent == overlord. Fix:
```solidity
function distributeRecursive(...) internal returns (
    uint256 totalPaid,
    address[] memory recipients,
    uint256[] memory amounts,
    uint8[] memory generations
) {
    address current = from;
    uint256 remaining = usdCents;
    totalPaid = 0;

    // Pre-allocate arrays (max 10 levels)
    recipients = new address[](10);
    amounts = new uint256[](10);
    generations = new uint8[](10);
    uint256 count = 0;

    for (uint256 i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        address parent = parentOf[current];
        if (parent == address(0)) break;

        uint16 bps = baseRoyaltyBps[current];
        if (bps > 0) {
            uint256 cut = (remaining * bps) / 10000;
            claimedCents[parent] += cut;
            recipients[count] = parent;
            amounts[count] = cut;
            generations[count] = uint8(i);
            count++;
            totalPaid += cut;
            remaining -= cut;
        }

        if (parent == overlord) break; // Check AFTER distributing
        current = parent;
    }

    // Resize arrays to actual count
    assembly {
        mstore(recipients, count)
        mstore(amounts, count)
        mstore(generations, count)
    }
}
```

### Fix 4: Test expectation alignment
The test expects childTBA to "retain" 18%, but the library credits PARENT. Either:
- **Option A**: Change library so child retains bps% and parent gets (100-bps)%
- **Option B**: Update test to match current library behavior (parent gets bps%)

## Files to Modify
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` | Fix unused param, add event emissions |
| `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` | Fix break order, return event data |
| `test/FullIntegration.test.js` | Verify expectations match implementation |

**Into `knowledge` array:**

  "source": "claude-code-2025-11-28"
},

### File: `scripts/sync_claude_memory.py`

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Sync Claude Code session to memory bank (GCS + Firestore + CLAUDE.md)"""

import json
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from google.cloud import storage, firestore

PROJECT_ID = "acquired-jet-478701-b3"
MEMORY_PATH = Path("erik-hancock-llm-memory/memory/current.json")
GCS_BUCKET = f"{PROJECT_ID}-workbench-memory"

def load_memory():
    return json.loads(MEMORY_PATH.read_text())

def save_memory(memory):
    MEMORY_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(memory, indent=2))

def merge_session(memory, session_data):
    """Merge session into conversations/knowledge arrays"""
    memory["conversations"].append(session_data["conversation"])
    memory["knowledge"].extend(session_data["knowledge"])
    memory["last_updated"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
    return memory

def sync_gcs(memory):
    """Upload to GCS bucket"""
    client = storage.Client(project=PROJECT_ID)
    bucket = client.bucket(GCS_BUCKET)
    blob = bucket.blob("memory/current.json")
    blob.upload_from_string(json.dumps(memory, indent=2))
    print(f"✓ Synced to gs://{GCS_BUCKET}/memory/current.json")

def sync_firestore(memory):
    """Real-time sync to Firestore"""
    db = firestore.Client(project=PROJECT_ID)
    doc_ref = db.collection("claude_memory").document("current")
    doc_ref.set(memory)
    print("✓ Synced to Firestore claude_memory/current")

def update_claude_md(session_summary):
    """Append session context to CLAUDE.md"""
    claude_md = Path("CLAUDE.md")
    content = claude_md.read_text()

    section = f"""
## Last Session: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}
{session_summary}
"""
    # Replace existing or append
    if "## Last Session:" in content:
        import re
        content = re.sub(r"## Last Session:.*?(?=\n## |\Z)", section, content, flags=re.DOTALL)
    else:
        content += section

    claude_md.write_text(content)
    print("✓ Updated CLAUDE.md")

def main():
    session_data = {
        "conversation": {
            "id": f"claude-code-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}",
            "source": "claude_code",
            "date": datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            "summary": "GKE quota fix, Terraform deploy shadowtagai-production",
            "key_decisions": [
                "Deleted autopilot-cluster-1 (freed 40 CPUs + 500GB SSD)",
                "Created shadowtagai-production GKE cluster",
                "Migrated Anthropic → Gemini in terraform configs"
            ],
            "artifacts": ["terraform/main.tf", "terraform/secrets.tf"]
        },
        "knowledge": [
            {"topic": "gke_quota", "learned": "Autopilot = 5 nodes × 8 CPUs = 40 CPUs"},
            {"topic": "terraform_bucket", "learned": "gs://acquired-jet-478701-b3-terraform-state"}
        ]
    }

    memory = load_memory()
    memory = merge_session(memory, session_data)
    save_memory(memory)
    sync_gcs(memory)
    sync_firestore(memory)
    update_claude_md(session_data["conversation"]["summary"])
    print("\n✅ Memory synced to all 3 targets")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

---

| `erik-hancock-llm-memory/memory/current.json` | MODIFY | Merge into conversations/knowledge |

# Plan: Fix ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty Solidity Contract

## Issues Identified

### 1. Compiler Warnings
```
Warning: Unused function parameter → contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol:139
         bytes calldata validationProof

Warning: Unused local variable → contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol:154
         uint256 totalPaid
```

### 2. Test Failure (Root Cause)
```
AssertionError: expected '0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6F4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266' (overlord)
                to equal '0x3d7d0aa0DF762a686E491F2b863E1Aa5F4fE0e1D' (childTBA)
```

**Root Cause**: `RoyaltyMath.distributeRecursive()` breaks the loop BEFORE distributing royalties when parent == overlord. Also, `RoyaltyPaid` event is never emitted in `distributeViaUserOp`.

## Fixes

### Fix 1: `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` line 137-139
Prefix unused parameter with underscore:
```solidity
function distributeViaUserOp(
    UserOperation calldata userOp,
    uint256 usdCents,
    bytes calldata /* validationProof */  // Or _validationProof
) external whenNotPaused {
```

### Fix 2: `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` line 152-159
Remove unused variable assignment and add RoyaltyPaid events:
```solidity
// 3. Multi-level royalty logic using Library
(uint256 totalPaid, address[] memory recipients, uint256[] memory amounts, uint8[] memory generations) =
    RoyaltyMath.distributeRecursive(
        fromTBA,
        usdCents,
        parentOf,
        baseRoyaltyBps,
        claimedCents,
        OVERLORD
    );

// Emit events for each payout
for (uint256 i = 0; i < recipients.length; i++) {
    emit RoyaltyPaid(recipients[i], amounts[i], generations[i]);
}
```

### Fix 3: `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` - Restructure logic
The loop breaks BEFORE distributing when parent == overlord. Fix:
```solidity
function distributeRecursive(...) internal returns (
    uint256 totalPaid,
    address[] memory recipients,
    uint256[] memory amounts,
    uint8[] memory generations
) {
    address current = from;
    uint256 remaining = usdCents;
    totalPaid = 0;

    // Pre-allocate arrays (max 10 levels)
    recipients = new address[](10);
    amounts = new uint256[](10);
    generations = new uint8[](10);
    uint256 count = 0;

    for (uint256 i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        address parent = parentOf[current];
        if (parent == address(0)) break;

        uint16 bps = baseRoyaltyBps[current];
        if (bps > 0) {
            uint256 cut = (remaining * bps) / 10000;
            claimedCents[parent] += cut;
            recipients[count] = parent;
            amounts[count] = cut;
            generations[count] = uint8(i);
            count++;
            totalPaid += cut;
            remaining -= cut;
        }

        if (parent == overlord) break; // Check AFTER distributing
        current = parent;
    }

    // Resize arrays to actual count
    assembly {
        mstore(recipients, count)
        mstore(amounts, count)
        mstore(generations, count)
    }
}
```

### Fix 4: Test expectation alignment
The test expects childTBA to "retain" 18%, but the library credits PARENT. Either:
- **Option A**: Change library so child retains bps% and parent gets (100-bps)%
- **Option B**: Update test to match current library behavior (parent gets bps%)

## Files to Modify
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `contracts/ShadowTagAI_DNARoyalty.sol` | Fix unused param, add event emissions |
| `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` | Fix break order, return event data |
| `test/FullIntegration.test.js` | Verify expectations match implementation |

### File: `scripts/sync_claude_memory.py`

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Sync Claude Code session to memory bank (GCS + Firestore + CLAUDE.md)"""

import json
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from google.cloud import storage, firestore

PROJECT_ID = "acquired-jet-478701-b3"
MEMORY_PATH = Path("erik-hancock-llm-memory/memory/current.json")
GCS_BUCKET = f"{PROJECT_ID}-workbench-memory"

def load_memory():
    return json.loads(MEMORY_PATH.read_text())

def save_memory(memory):
    MEMORY_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(memory, indent=2))

def merge_session(memory, session_data):
    """Merge session into conversations/knowledge arrays"""
    memory["conversations"].append(session_data["conversation"])
    memory["knowledge"].extend(session_data["knowledge"])
    memory["last_updated"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
    return memory

def sync_gcs(memory):
    """Upload to GCS bucket"""
    client = storage.Client(project=PROJECT_ID)
    bucket = client.bucket(GCS_BUCKET)
    blob = bucket.blob("memory/current.json")
    blob.upload_from_string(json.dumps(memory, indent=2))
    print(f"✓ Synced to gs://{GCS_BUCKET}/memory/current.json")

def sync_firestore(memory):
    """Real-time sync to Firestore"""
    db = firestore.Client(project=PROJECT_ID)
    doc_ref = db.collection("claude_memory").document("current")
    doc_ref.set(memory)
    print("✓ Synced to Firestore claude_memory/current")

def update_claude_md(session_summary):
    """Append session context to CLAUDE.md"""
    claude_md = Path("CLAUDE.md")
    content = claude_md.read_text()

    section = f"""
## Last Session: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}
{session_summary}
"""
    # Replace existing or append
    if "## Last Session:" in content:
        import re
        content = re.sub(r"## Last Session:.*?(?=\n## |\Z)", section, content, flags=re.DOTALL)
    else:
        content += section

    claude_md.write_text(content)
    print("✓ Updated CLAUDE.md")

def main():
    session_data = {
        "conversation": {
            "id": f"claude-code-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}",
            "source": "claude_code",
            "date": datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            "summary": "GKE quota fix, Terraform deploy shadowtagai-production",
            "key_decisions": [
                "Deleted autopilot-cluster-1 (freed 40 CPUs + 500GB SSD)",
                "Created shadowtagai-production GKE cluster",
                "Migrated Anthropic → Gemini in terraform configs"
            ],
            "artifacts": ["terraform/main.tf", "terraform/secrets.tf"]
        },
        "knowledge": [
            {"topic": "gke_quota", "learned": "Autopilot = 5 nodes × 8 CPUs = 40 CPUs"},
            {"topic": "terraform_bucket", "learned": "gs://acquired-jet-478701-b3-terraform-state"}
        ]
    }

    memory = load_memory()
    memory = merge_session(memory, session_data)
    save_memory(memory)
    sync_gcs(memory)
    sync_firestore(memory)
    update_claude_md(session_data["conversation"]["summary"])
    print("\n✅ Memory synced to all 3 targets")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

---

## Files to Create/Modify

| File | Action | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `scripts/sync_claude_memory.py` | CREATE | Unified sync script |
| `erik-hancock-llm-memory/memory/current.json` | MODIFY | Merge into conversations/knowledge |
| `/CLAUDE.md` | MODIFY | Append "Last Session" section |

### Fix 3: `contracts/libraries/RoyaltyMath.sol` - Restructure logic
The loop breaks BEFORE distributing when parent == overlord. Fix:
```solidity
function distributeRecursive(...) internal returns (
    uint256 totalPaid,
    address[] memory recipients,
    uint256[] memory amounts,
    uint8[] memory generations
) {
    address current = from;
    uint256 remaining = usdCents;
    totalPaid = 0;

    // Pre-allocate arrays (max 10 levels)
    recipients = new address[](10);
    amounts = new uint256[](10);
    generations = new uint8[](10);
    uint256 count = 0;

    for (uint256 i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        address parent = parentOf[current];
        if (parent == address(0)) break;

        uint16 bps = baseRoyaltyBps[current];
        if (bps > 0) {
            uint256 cut = (remaining * bps) / 10000;
            claimedCents[parent] += cut;
            recipients[count] = parent;
            amounts[count] = cut;
            generations[count] = uint8(i);
            count++;
            totalPaid += cut;
            remaining -= cut;
        }

        if (parent == overlord) break; // Check AFTER distributing
        current = parent;
    }

    // Resize arrays to actual count
    assembly {
        mstore(recipients, count)
        mstore(amounts, count)
        mstore(generations, count)
    }
}
```

The test expects childTBA to "retain" 18%, but the library credits PARENT. Either:
- **Option A**: Change library so child retains bps% and parent gets (100-bps)%

### File: `scripts/sync_claude_memory.py`

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Sync Claude Code session to memory bank (GCS + Firestore + CLAUDE.md)"""

import json
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from google.cloud import storage, firestore

PROJECT_ID = "acquired-jet-478701-b3"
MEMORY_PATH = Path("erik-hancock-llm-memory/memory/current.json")
GCS_BUCKET = f"{PROJECT_ID}-workbench-memory"

def load_memory():
    return json.loads(MEMORY_PATH.read_text())

def save_memory(memory):
    MEMORY_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(memory, indent=2))

def merge_session(memory, session_data):
    """Merge session into conversations/knowledge arrays"""
    memory["conversations"].append(session_data["conversation"])
    memory["knowledge"].extend(session_data["knowledge"])
    memory["last_updated"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
    return memory

def sync_gcs(memory):
    """Upload to GCS bucket"""
    client = storage.Client(project=PROJECT_ID)
    bucket = client.bucket(GCS_BUCKET)
    blob = bucket.blob("memory/current.json")
    blob.upload_from_string(json.dumps(memory, indent=2))
    print(f"✓ Synced to gs://{GCS_BUCKET}/memory/current.json")

def sync_firestore(memory):
    """Real-time sync to Firestore"""
    db = firestore.Client(project=PROJECT_ID)
    doc_ref = db.collection("claude_memory").document("current")
    doc_ref.set(memory)
    print("✓ Synced to Firestore claude_memory/current")

def update_claude_md(session_summary):
    """Append session context to CLAUDE.md"""
    claude_md = Path("CLAUDE.md")
    content = claude_md.read_text()

    section = f"""
## Last Session: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}
{session_summary}
"""
    # Replace existing or append
    if "## Last Session:" in content:
        import re
        content = re.sub(r"## Last Session:.*?(?=\n## |\Z)", section, content, flags=re.DOTALL)
    else:
        content += section

    claude_md.write_text(content)
    print("✓ Updated CLAUDE.md")

def main():
    session_data = {
        "conversation": {
            "id": f"claude-code-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}",
            "source": "claude_code",
            "date": datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            "summary": "GKE quota fix, Terraform deploy shadowtagai-production",
            "key_decisions": [
                "Deleted autopilot-cluster-1 (freed 40 CPUs + 500GB SSD)",
                "Created shadowtagai-production GKE cluster",
                "Migrated Anthropic → Gemini in terraform configs"
            ],
            "artifacts": ["terraform/main.tf", "terraform/secrets.tf"]
        },
        "knowledge": [
            {"topic": "gke_quota", "learned": "Autopilot = 5 nodes × 8 CPUs = 40 CPUs"},
            {"topic": "terraform_bucket", "learned": "gs://acquired-jet-478701-b3-terraform-state"}
        ]
    }

    memory = load_memory()
    memory = merge_session(memory, session_data)
    save_memory(memory)
    sync_gcs(memory)
    sync_firestore(memory)
    update_claude_md(session_data["conversation"]["summary"])
    print("\n✅ Memory synced to all 3 targets")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

---

## Files to Create/Modify

| File | Action | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `scripts/sync_claude_memory.py` | CREATE | Unified sync script |
| `erik-hancock-llm-memory/memory/current.json` | MODIFY | Merge into conversations/knowledge |
| `/CLAUDE.md` | MODIFY | Append "Last Session" section |

---

## Execution
```bash
cd aiyou-fastapi-services
python3 scripts/sync_claude_memory.py
```

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Sync Claude Code session to memory bank (GCS + Firestore + CLAUDE.md)

Usage:
    python3 scripts/sync_claude_memory.py

Prerequisites:
    - google-cloud-storage and google-cloud-firestore installed
    - ADC credentials configured
    - GCS bucket exists (creates if not)
"""

import json
import re
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

PROJECT_ID = "acquired-jet-478701-b3"
MEMORY_PATH = Path(__file__).parent.parent / "erik-hancock-llm-memory" / "memory" / "current.json"
GCS_BUCKET = f"{PROJECT_ID}-workbench-memory"
CLAUDE_MD_PATH = Path(__file__).parent.parent / "CLAUDE.md"


def load_memory() -> dict:
    """Load existing memory from current.json"""
    if not MEMORY_PATH.exists():
        return {
            "version": "1.0.0",
            "last_updated": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            "conversations": [],
            "knowledge": []
        }
    return json.loads(MEMORY_PATH.read_text())


def save_memory(memory: dict) -> None:
    """Save memory to current.json"""
    MEMORY_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(memory, indent=2))
    print(f"  Saved to {MEMORY_PATH}")


def merge_session(memory: dict, session_data: dict) -> dict:
    """Merge session into conversations/knowledge arrays"""
    # Check for duplicate conversation ID
    existing_ids = {c.get("id") or c.get("conversation_id") for c in memory.get("conversations", [])}
    if session_data["conversation"]["id"] not in existing_ids:
        memory["conversations"].append(session_data["conversation"])

    # Merge knowledge (dedupe by topic)
    existing_topics = {k.get("topic") for k in memory.get("knowledge", [])}
    for k in session_data.get("knowledge", []):
        if k.get("topic") not in existing_topics:
            memory.setdefault("knowledge", []).append(k)
            existing_topics.add(k.get("topic"))

    memory["last_updated"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
    return memory


def sync_gcs(memory: dict) -> bool:
    """Upload to GCS bucket"""
    try:
        from google.cloud import storage
        client = storage.Client(project=PROJECT_ID)

        # Create bucket if it doesn't exist
        try:
            bucket = client.get_bucket(GCS_BUCKET)
        except Exception:
            print(f"  Creating bucket {GCS_BUCKET}...")
            bucket = client.create_bucket(GCS_BUCKET, location="us-central1")

        blob = bucket.blob("memory/current.json")
        blob.upload_from_string(
            json.dumps(memory, indent=2),
            content_type="application/json"
        )
        print(f"  Synced to gs://{GCS_BUCKET}/memory/current.json")
        return True
    except ImportError:
        print("  [SKIP] google-cloud-storage not installed")
        return False
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  [ERROR] GCS sync failed: {e}")
        return False


def sync_firestore(memory: dict) -> bool:
    """Real-time sync to Firestore"""
    try:
        from google.cloud import firestore
        db = firestore.Client(project=PROJECT_ID)
        doc_ref = db.collection("claude_memory").document("current")

        # Firestore has a 1MB limit, so we store a summary
        summary = {
            "version": memory.get("version"),
            "last_updated": memory.get("last_updated"),
            "conversation_count": len(memory.get("conversations", [])),
            "knowledge_count": len(memory.get("knowledge", [])),
            "latest_conversation": memory.get("conversations", [{}])[-1] if memory.get("conversations") else {},
            "pnkln_architecture": memory.get("pnkln_architecture", {}),
            "llm_allocation": memory.get("llm_allocation", {}),
            "bootstrap_gates": memory.get("bootstrap_gates", {})
        }

        doc_ref.set(summary)
        print("  Synced to Firestore claude_memory/current")
        return True
    except ImportError:
        print("  [SKIP] google-cloud-firestore not installed")
        return False
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  [ERROR] Firestore sync failed: {e}")
        return False


def update_claude_md(session_summary: str) -> bool:
    """Append session context to CLAUDE.md"""
    try:
        if not CLAUDE_MD_PATH.exists():
            print(f"  [SKIP] CLAUDE.md not found at {CLAUDE_MD_PATH}")
            return False

        content = CLAUDE_MD_PATH.read_text()

        section = f"""
## Last Session: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}

- **Summary**: {session_summary}
- **Memory Synced**: GCS + Firestore + CLAUDE.md
- **Squadron**: 650 agents operational on :8600

"""
        # Replace existing or append before last update line
        if "## Last Session:" in content:
            content = re.sub(
                r"## Last Session:.*?(?=\n## |\n---|\*Last updated|\Z)",
                section,
                content,
                flags=re.DOTALL
            )
        else:
            # Insert before "Last updated" line if it exists
            if "*Last updated:" in content:
                content = content.replace("*Last updated:", f"{section}*Last updated:")
            else:
                content += section

        CLAUDE_MD_PATH.write_text(content)
        print(f"  Updated {CLAUDE_MD_PATH}")
        return True
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  [ERROR] CLAUDE.md update failed: {e}")
        return False


def main():
    print("=" * 60)
    print("Claude Memory Sync - All 3 Targets")
    print("=" * 60)

    # Session data to merge
    session_data = {
        "conversation": {
            "id": f"claude-code-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}",
            "source": "claude_code",
            "date": datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            "summary": "GKE quota fix, Terraform deploy shadowtagai-production, memory sync setup",
            "key_decisions": [

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Sync Claude Code session to memory bank (GCS + Firestore + CLAUDE.md)

Usage:
    python3 scripts/sync_claude_memory.py

Prerequisites:
    - google-cloud-storage and google-cloud-firestore installed
    - ADC credentials configured
    - GCS bucket exists (creates if not)
"""

import json
import re
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

PROJECT_ID = "acquired-jet-478701-b3"
MEMORY_PATH = Path(__file__).parent.parent / "erik-hancock-llm-memory" / "memory" / "current.json"
GCS_BUCKET = f"{PROJECT_ID}-workbench-memory"
CLAUDE_MD_PATH = Path(__file__).parent.parent / "CLAUDE.md"


def load_memory() -> dict:
    """Load existing memory from current.json"""
    if not MEMORY_PATH.exists():
        return {
            "version": "1.0.0",
            "last_updated": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            "conversations": [],
            "knowledge": []
        }
    return json.loads(MEMORY_PATH.read_text())


def save_memory(memory: dict) -> None:
    """Save memory to current.json"""
    MEMORY_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(memory, indent=2))
    print(f"  Saved to {MEMORY_PATH}")


def merge_session(memory: dict, session_data: dict) -> dict:
    """Merge session into conversations/knowledge arrays"""
    # Check for duplicate conversation ID
    existing_ids = {c.get("id") or c.get("conversation_id") for c in memory.get("conversations", [])}
    if session_data["conversation"]["id"] not in existing_ids:
        memory["conversations"].append(session_data["conversation"])

    # Merge knowledge (dedupe by topic)
    existing_topics = {k.get("topic") for k in memory.get("knowledge", [])}
    for k in session_data.get("knowledge", []):
        if k.get("topic") not in existing_topics:
            memory.setdefault("knowledge", []).append(k)
            existing_topics.add(k.get("topic"))

    memory["last_updated"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
    return memory


def sync_gcs(memory: dict) -> bool:
    """Upload to GCS bucket"""
    try:
        from google.cloud import storage
        client = storage.Client(project=PROJECT_ID)

        # Create bucket if it doesn't exist
        try:
            bucket = client.get_bucket(GCS_BUCKET)
        except Exception:
            print(f"  Creating bucket {GCS_BUCKET}...")
            bucket = client.create_bucket(GCS_BUCKET, location="us-central1")

        blob = bucket.blob("memory/current.json")
        blob.upload_from_string(
            json.dumps(memory, indent=2),
            content_type="application/json"
        )
        print(f"  Synced to gs://{GCS_BUCKET}/memory/current.json")
        return True
    except ImportError:
        print("  [SKIP] google-cloud-storage not installed")
        return False
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  [ERROR] GCS sync failed: {e}")
        return False


def sync_firestore(memory: dict) -> bool:
    """Real-time sync to Firestore"""
    try:
        from google.cloud import firestore
        db = firestore.Client(project=PROJECT_ID)
        doc_ref = db.collection("claude_memory").document("current")

        # Firestore has a 1MB limit, so we store a summary
        summary = {
            "version": memory.get("version"),
            "last_updated": memory.get("last_updated"),
            "conversation_count": len(memory.get("conversations", [])),
            "knowledge_count": len(memory.get("knowledge", [])),
            "latest_conversation": memory.get("conversations", [{}])[-1] if memory.get("conversations") else {},
            "pnkln_architecture": memory.get("pnkln_architecture", {}),
            "llm_allocation": memory.get("llm_allocation", {}),
            "bootstrap_gates": memory.get("bootstrap_gates", {})
        }

        doc_ref.set(summary)
        print("  Synced to Firestore claude_memory/current")
        return True
    except ImportError:
        print("  [SKIP] google-cloud-firestore not installed")
        return False
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  [ERROR] Firestore sync failed: {e}")
        return False


def update_claude_md(session_summary: str) -> bool:
    """Append session context to CLAUDE.md"""
    try:
        if not CLAUDE_MD_PATH.exists():
            print(f"  [SKIP] CLAUDE.md not found at {CLAUDE_MD_PATH}")
            return False

        content = CLAUDE_MD_PATH.read_text()

        section = f"""
## Last Session: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}

- **Summary**: {session_summary}
- **Memory Synced**: GCS + Firestore + CLAUDE.md
- **Squadron**: 650 agents operational on :8600

"""
        # Replace existing or append before last update line
        if "## Last Session:" in content:
            content = re.sub(
                r"## Last Session:.*?(?=\n## |\n---|\*Last updated|\Z)",
                section,
                content,
                flags=re.DOTALL
            )
        else:
            # Insert before "Last updated" line if it exists
            if "*Last updated:" in content:
                content = content.replace("*Last updated:", f"{section}*Last updated:")
            else:
                content += section

        CLAUDE_MD_PATH.write_text(content)
        print(f"  Updated {CLAUDE_MD_PATH}")
        return True
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  [ERROR] CLAUDE.md update failed: {e}")
        return False


def main():
    print("=" * 60)
    print("Claude Memory Sync - All 3 Targets")
    print("=" * 60)

    # Session data to merge
    session_data = {
        "conversation": {
            "id": f"claude-code-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}",
            "source": "claude_code",
            "date": datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            "summary": "GKE quota fix, Terraform deploy shadowtagai-production, memory sync setup",
            "key_decisions": [
                "Deleted autopilot-cluster-1 (freed 40 CPUs + 500GB SSD)",
                "Created shadowtagai-production GKE cluster",
                "Migrated Anthropic -> Gemini in terraform configs",
                "Set up 3-way memory sync (GCS + Firestore + CLAUDE.md)"
            ],
            "artifacts": [
                "terraform/main.tf",
                "terraform/secrets.tf",
                "scripts/sync_claude_memory.py"
            ]
        },
        "knowledge": [
            {
                "topic": "gke_quota_management",
                "learned": "Autopilot clusters consume 5 nodes x 8 CPUs = 40 CPUs quota",
                "source": "claude-code-2025-11-28"
            },
            {
                "topic": "terraform_state_bucket",
                "learned": "Backend bucket: gs://acquired-jet-478701-b3-terraform-state",
                "source": "claude-code-2025-11-28"
            },
            {
                "topic": "memory_sync_pattern",
                "learned": "3-way sync: local JSON -> GCS bucket -> Firestore + CLAUDE.md",
                "source": "claude-code-2025-11-28"
            }
        ]
    }

    # Step 1: Load and merge
    print("\n[1/4] Loading memory...")
    memory = load_memory()
    print(f"  Loaded {len(memory.get('conversations', []))} conversations, {len(memory.get('knowledge', []))} knowledge items")

    print("\n[2/4] Merging session...")
    memory = merge_session(memory, session_data)
    save_memory(memory)

    # Step 2: Sync to GCS
    print("\n[3/4] Syncing to GCS...")
    gcs_ok = sync_gcs(memory)

    # Step 3: Sync to Firestore
    print("\n[4/4] Syncing to Firestore...")
    fs_ok = sync_firestore(memory)

    # Step 4: Update CLAUDE.md
    print("\n[5/5] Updating CLAUDE.md...")
    md_ok = update_claude_md(session_data["conversation"]["summary"])

    # Summary
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("SYNC COMPLETE")
    print("=" * 60)
    print(f"  Local JSON: OK")
    print(f"  GCS Bucket: {'OK' if gcs_ok else 'SKIPPED'}")
    print(f"  Firestore:  {'OK' if fs_ok else 'SKIPPED'}")
    print(f"  CLAUDE.md:  {'OK' if md_ok else 'SKIPPED'}")
    print("=" * 60)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
